name: Fujimaki
description: Fujimaki is fight-holic and the 'bad-boy' of the anime. He has a snobbish attitude and picking up fights is in his blood. He's almost always seen carrying a wooden scabbard which contains a katana sword. He can't swim.   He is the member of the main force with the least screen time and even says himself that people would probably forget about him if he were to have disappeared.
